emails.subject: New File Naming Standards - Data Directory
emails.body:
Hi Alice,

As discussed in our team meeting last week, we're standardizing file names across all project directories.

For the data directory, please rename all files to follow this convention:
- Format: data_XXX.txt (where XXX is a three-digit sequential number)
- Start numbering from 001
- Example: data_001.txt, data_002.txt, data_003.txt, etc.

This will help us maintain consistency across the project and make automated scripts work properly.

Please post an update to the #project-files channel once you've completed the renaming so the rest of the team knows.

Thanks!
Carol
Project Manager
